TopModule.BindInstances: output_buf_U output_buf_1_U output_buf_2_U output_buf_3_U output_buf_4_U output_buf_5_U output_buf_6_U output_buf_7_U output_buf_8_U output_buf_9_U p_ZZ39bert_ffn_down_residual_norm_fp32_kernelE10output_buf_10_U p_ZZ39bert_ffn_down_residual_norm_fp32_kernelE10output_buf_11_U p_ZZ39bert_ffn_down_residual_norm_fp32_kernelE10output_buf_12_U p_ZZ39bert_ffn_down_residual_norm_fp32_kernelE10output_buf_13_U p_ZZ39bert_ffn_down_residual_norm_fp32_kernelE10output_buf_14_U p_ZZ39bert_ffn_down_residual_norm_fp32_kernelE10output_buf_15_U

field.name: Enable
field.description: Master enable for the device interrupt output to the system interrupt controller: 0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled

field.name: CHAN0_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 0 (ap_done) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 0 interrupt, 1 = Channel 0 interrupt.

field.name: CHAN1_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 1 (ap_ready) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 1 interrupt, 1 = Channel 1 interrupt.

table.keys: Interface, Data Width (SW->HW), Address Width, Latency, Offset, Register, Max Widen Bitwidth, Max Read Burst Length, Max Write Burst Length, Num Read Outstanding, Num Write Outstanding
Interface, Data Width, Address Width, Offset, Register
Interface, Register, Offset, Width, Access, Description, Bit Fields
table.column: CTRL, 0x00, 32, RW, Control signals, 0=AP_START 1=AP_DONE 2=AP_IDLE 3=AP_READY 7=AUTO_RESTART 9=INTERRUPT
GIER, 0x04, 32, RW, Global Interrupt Enable Register, 0=Enable
IP_IER, 0x08, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Enable Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_EN 1=CHAN1_INT_EN
IP_ISR, 0x0c, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Status Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_ST 1=CHAN1_INT_ST
w2_1, 0x10, 32, W, Data signal of w2,
w2_2, 0x14, 32, W, Data signal of w2,
b2_1, 0x1c, 32, W, Data signal of b2,
b2_2, 0x20, 32, W, Data signal of b2,
final_norm_gamma_1, 0x28, 32, W, Data signal of final_norm_gamma,
final_norm_gamma_2, 0x2c, 32, W, Data signal of final_norm_gamma,
final_norm_beta_1, 0x34, 32, W, Data signal of final_norm_beta,
final_norm_beta_2, 0x38, 32, W, Data signal of final_norm_beta,
output_hidden_1, 0x40, 32, W, Data signal of output_hidden,
output_hidden_2, 0x44, 32, W, Data signal of output_hidden,

table.keys: Interface, Register Mode, TDATA, TREADY, TVALID

table.column: clock, ap_clk,
reset, ap_rst_n,
interrupt, interrupt,
ap_ctrl_hs, ,
in, stream<ap_uint<512> 0>&
in, stream<ap_uint<512> 0>&
in, ap_uint<512>*
in, ap_uint<512>*
in, ap_uint<512>*
in, ap_uint<512>*
out, ap_uint<512>*

table.keys: Argument, HW Interface, HW Type, HW Usage, HW Info
table.column: gelu_stream, interface, ,
ffn_residual_stream, interface, ,
m_axi_gmem_w2, interface, ,
s_axi_control, register, offset, name=w2_1 offset=0x10 range=32

section.name: M_AXI Burst Information
section.HEADER_NOTE: Note: All burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.
